title: Moderation Update – 2026-04-28
body:
We completed a triage of the abuse queue today. Here is a summary of actions taken:

**Bans (2)**
- spam_wave_42 — Banned for posting phishing links across 6 channels within 20 minutes.
- toxic_runner — Banned for repeated targeted harassment of newcomers.

**No Action / Dismissed (1)**
- report_006 (core_maintainer) — Confirmed false positive; report was the result of a coordinated brigading campaign following a legitimate moderation decision. No action taken.

**Remaining Queue**
- report_003 (trusted_helper, medium/dispute) and report_004 (new_member_17, low/formatting) remain open for human moderator review.
- report_005 (bot_like_user_77, medium/suspicious_automation) flagged for further review.

Our community standards remain in effect. Thank you to everyone who submitted reports.
